# jspdf-md-renderer — AI Agent Reference

## Package
- npm: jspdf-md-renderer
- Version: 3.2.0
- License: MIT
- Repository: https://github.com/JeelGajera/jspdf-md-renderer

## What it does
Renders Markdown content directly into jsPDF PDF documents with full custom styling options.
Built on top of jsPDF with marked.js for markdown parsing and jspdf-autotable for table rendering.

## Installation
```
npm install jspdf-md-renderer
```

## Core API

### MdTextRender(doc, text, options)
Renders markdown into a jsPDF doc.
- doc: jsPDF instance
- text: string — raw markdown content
- options: RenderOption (see below)
- Returns: Promise<void>

### MdTextParser(text)
Parses markdown into structured tokens.
- text: string — raw markdown content
- Returns: Promise<ParsedElement[]>

## RenderOption — Full Options Reference

### cursor (required)
- cursor.x: number — Starting X position
- cursor.y: number — Starting Y position

### page
- page.format: string | number[] — Page format (default: 'a4')
- page.unit: string — Unit: 'mm', 'pt', 'px', 'in'
- page.orientation: string — 'portrait'/'p' or 'landscape'/'l' (default: 'p')
- page.maxContentWidth: number — Max content width (default: 190)
- page.maxContentHeight: number — Max height before page break (default: 277)
- page.lineSpace: number — Spacing between elements (default: 1.5)
- page.defaultLineHeightFactor: number — Line height factor (default: 1.2)
- page.defaultFontSize: number — Body font size (default: 12)
- page.defaultTitleFontSize: number — Heading font size (default: 14)
- page.topmargin: number — New page top margin (default: 10)
- page.xpading: number — Horizontal content padding (default: 10)
- page.xmargin: number — Left margin (default: 10)
- page.indent: number — Nested list indent per level (default: 10)

### font
- font.bold: { name: string, style: string } — Bold font (default: helvetica bold)
- font.regular: { name: string, style: string } — Regular font (default: helvetica normal)
- font.light: { name: string, style: string } — Light font (default: helvetica light)

### content (optional)
- content.textAlignment: 'left' | 'right' | 'center' | 'justify'

### codespan (optional)
- codespan.backgroundColor: string — Inline code bg (default: '#EEEEEE')
- codespan.padding: number — Inline code padding (default: 0.5)
- codespan.showBackground: boolean — Show background (default: true)
- codespan.fontSizeScale: number — Code font scale (default: 0.9)

### link (optional)
- link.linkColor: [number, number, number] — RGB link color

### table (optional)
- Passes through to jspdf-autotable UserOptions

### image (optional)
- image.defaultAlign: 'left' | 'center' | 'right' (default: 'left')

### Callbacks
- endCursorYHandler: (y: number) => void — Required. Called with final Y position after rendering.
- pageBreakHandler: (doc: jsPDF) => void — Optional. Called when new page is added.

## Supported Markdown Elements
- headings (# through ######)
- paragraphs (plain text blocks)
- lists (ordered 1., unordered -, nested, mixed)
- horizontal rules (---, ***, ___)
- bold (**text** or __text__)
- italic (*text* or _text_)
- bold-italic (***text***)
- code blocks (fenced ```lang blocks)
- inline code (`code`)
- links ([text](url))
- blockquotes (> text)
- images (![alt](url) with optional attributes)
- tables (GFM pipe tables)

## Image Attribute Syntax
```
![alt](url){width=200 height=150 align=center}
```
Attributes: width/w (px), height/h (px), align (left|center|right)
Sizing: width-only or height-only auto-calculates the other from aspect ratio.
Images exceeding page width are scaled down proportionally.

## UMD / Browser Usage
Load scripts in order: marked → jspdf → jspdf-autotable → jspdf-md-renderer
Access via: window.jspdf.jsPDF and window.JspdfMdRenderer.MdTextRender

## Basic Example
```javascript
import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
import { MdTextRender } from 'jspdf-md-renderer';

const doc = new jsPDF({ unit: 'mm', format: 'a4' });
await MdTextRender(doc, '# Hello World', {
  cursor: { x: 10, y: 10 },
  page: { maxContentWidth: 190, maxContentHeight: 277, lineSpace: 1.5,
    defaultLineHeightFactor: 1.2, defaultFontSize: 12, defaultTitleFontSize: 14,
    topmargin: 10, xpading: 10, xmargin: 10, indent: 10 },
  font: { bold: { name: 'helvetica', style: 'bold' },
    regular: { name: 'helvetica', style: 'normal' },
    light: { name: 'helvetica', style: 'light' } },
  endCursorYHandler: (y) => console.log('End Y:', y),
});
doc.save('output.pdf');
```

- /guide/getting-started — Quick start guide
- /guide/installation — All install methods
- /guide/basic-usage — Detailed usage guide
- /guide/browser-usage — Browser-specific usage
- /api/options — Full options reference

- /elements/headings — Headings element
- /elements/paragraphs — Paragraphs element
- /elements/text-styles — Bold, italic, code
- /elements/lists — Lists element
- /elements/links — Links element
- /elements/images — Images element

- /elements/blockquotes — Blockquotes element
- /elements/horizontal-rules — Horizontal rules element

- /examples/report — Technical report example
- /examples/custom-fonts — Custom fonts guide
